query_title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum

recommendations.title: The Four Musketeers
recommendations.overview: The Four Musketeers defend the queen and her dressmaker from Cardinal Richelieu and Milady de Winter.

recommendations.title: Robin and Marian
recommendations.overview: Robin Hood, aging none too gracefully, returns exhausted from the Crusades to woo and win Maid Marian one last time.

recommendations.title: A Hard Day's Night
recommendations.overview: Capturing John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison and Ringo Starr in their electrifying element, 'A Hard Day's Night' is a wildly irreverent journey through this pastiche of a day in the life of The Beatles during 1964. The band have to use all

recommendations.title: Superman II
recommendations.overview: Three Kryptonian criminals led by General Zod team up with Lex Luthor to conquer Earth, forcing a depowered Superman to regain his strength and stop them.

recommendations.title: Help!

recommendations.title: Juggernaut
recommendations.overview: A terrorist demands a huge ransom in exchange for information on how to disarm the seven bombs he has planted aboard a trans-Atlantic cruise ship. Inspired by real events.

recommendations.title: The Three Musketeers

recommendations.title: Superman III
recommendations.overview: Aiming to defeat the Man of Steel, wealthy executive Ross Webster hires bumbling but brilliant Gus Gorman to develop synthetic kryptonite, which yields some unexpected psychological effects. Between rekindling romance with his high school sweetheart

recommendations.title: The Return of the Musketeers
recommendations.overview: It's 1649: Mazarin hires the impoverished D'Artagnan to find the other musketeers: Cromwell has overthrown the English king, so Mazarin fears revolt, particularly from the popular Beaufort. Porthos, bored with riches and wanting a title, signs on, bu

recommendations.title: Trading Places
recommendations.overview: A snobbish investor and a wily street con-artist find their positions reversed as part of a bet by two callous millionaires.
